texto: The average person doesn't understand what a stem cell is. There's a lack of health literacy in our nation. texto: Do any of us actually want to live in a world where your boss can decide that he or she is morally opposed to mental health care? texto: I got into medical school at the University of California in San Francisco and did well. A lot of smart kids in medical school, and believe me, I wasn't not nearly the smartest one, but I was the most focused and the happiest kid in medical school. In 1979, I graduated as the valedictorian and was honored with the Gold Cane Award.
